wikimediaevents-desc: Waxay diiwaangelisaa dhacdooyinka gaarka ah ee Wikimedia iyadoo adeegsanaysa EventLogging
apihelp-wikimediaeventsblockededit-summa: Diiwaangeli macluumaadka ku saabsan isku dayada wax ka beddelka ee la xannibay
apihelp-wikimediaeventsblockededit-param: Bog lagu sameeyay isku day wax ka beddel ah
Is dhexgalka loo adeegsaday wax ka beddelka
Barmaamijka loo adeegsaday wax ka beddelka
tag-cross-wiki-upload: Gelinta faylka ee wiki-yada kala duwan
tag-cross-wiki-upload-description: Faylal laga soo geliyay gudaha tifaftiraha wikitext iyo tifaftiraha muuqaalka ee wiki-yada kale
wikimediaevents-special-wikimediadebug-h: Kukiga [https://wikitech.wikimedia.org/wiki/WikimediaDebug WikimediaDebug] hadda waa '''la hawlgeliyay''' $1. Wuxuu dhacayaa $2. Guji badhanka si aad uga tirtirto qalabkan. Fadlan ogow in tani ay kaliya ka tirtirayso kukiga domain-kan — haddii aad ka hawlgelisay domains kale, waa inaad si gaar ah uga nadiifi adigoo adeegsanaya bogga gaarka ah ee domain-yadaas (ama isticmaal qalabka nadiifinta kukiyada ee biraawsar kaaga).

Guji badhanka si aad u hawlgeliso kukiga [https://wikitech.wikimedia.org/wiki/WikimediaDebug WikimediaDebug] ee $1. Marka la hawlgeliyo, codsiyada web-ka ee ka yimaadda qalabkaaga ee wiki-kan waxay '''u diri doonaan summada qaladka ah oo ay ku jiraan xog shaqsiyeed''' server-yada Wikimedia Foundation. Fadlan kaliya hawl geli haddii uu ku codsaday horumariye. Ogow in tani ay keeni doonto waayo-aragnimo biraawsarka oo gaabis ah. Haddii tijaabadaadu ay ku lug leedahay domain-yo badan, xusuusnow inaad sidoo kale ka hawlgeliso kukiga adigoo isticmaalaya bogga gaarka ah ee domain-yada kale.
